questions.question: Which movie received the Best Picture honour at the 97ᵗʰ Academy Awards in 2025?

Which of the following developments followed the MoU signed between GRSE and Norway’s Kongsberg at Nor-Shipping 2025?
questions.option_1: India will jointly operate a Polar Research Vessel with Norway.
questions.option_2: India will purchase its first Polar Research Vessel from Norway.
questions.option_3: India will fund Norway’s Polar Research under a new agreement.
questions.option_4: India will begin building its first indigenously made Polar Vessel.

questions.question: In May 2025, which Indian company emerged as the lowest bidder for the Indian Navy’s Next Generation Corvettes (NGC) project, valued at over ₹25,000 crore?

Which international summit on artificial intelligence was held in Bengaluru in 2025, highlighting the importance of ethical and inclusive AI collaboration between India and France?
questions.option_1: La French Tech India AI Summit
